description: GitLab MCP tools for repositories, merge requests, issues, CI/CD pipelines, and wikis.

interface.shortDescription: GitLab MCP tools for repositories, merge requests, issues, and pipelines.
interface.longDescription: Connect DotCraft to GitLab's MCP server for repository management, merge requests, issues, CI/CD pipelines, wikis, and related GitLab DevOps workflows.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use GitLab MCP tools to inspect repositories, merge requests, issues, and pipelines.
